title: layia heterotricha
intro: Layia heterotricha, also known as Tidy Tips or Sticky Phacelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Layia heterotricha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
